sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6843" key="a)nakukliko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακυκλ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n6843.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easy to turn round,</tr_> of a verse that will read either backwards or forwards, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀναστρέφον ἢ ἀνακυκλικόν</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.323</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> tit.</sense> </entryFree>
